programme.title: TBH 219
programme.desc: TBH 219

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Flyod Smoot the conductor is courting a woman through the mail - but when she ends it after receiving a photo of him he loses all confidence Kate tries to help him think all the women from Hooterville and the surrounding area have eyes for him but instead he gets the idea that Kate has been secretly in love with him - now how does she let him down without breaking his heart again

programme.title: Munsters 108
programme.desc: Munsters 108

programme.title: Addams 209
programme.desc: Addams 209

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Dale Reinhart pursues the girl who dumped him and dresses in drag to get the only available cabin Bickering Maury and Stella Marshall get stuck in a elevator Janette Bradford is followed by the PI her husband hired to keep tabs on her

programme.title: Daktari 401
programme.desc: Daktari 401

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: The detectives do their best to recover a stolen bike stolen from a handicapped girl meanwhile Harvey hires a cleaning lady for Lacey

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch are in Las Vegas to catch a serial killer who has strangled a string of chorus girls What they dont realize is the prime suspect is an old high-school friend of Hutchs

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke agrees to help his nephew with a missing-person case which quickly leads to a dangerous drug-smuggling ring

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S04E28
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S04E28

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E21
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E21

programme.title: TBH 104
programme.desc: TBH 104

programme.title: TBh 106
programme.desc: TBh 106

programme.title: Munsters 132
programme.desc: Munsters 132

programme.title: Munsters 104
programme.desc: Munsters 104

programme.title: Addams Family 121
programme.desc: Addams Family 121

programme.title: Addams 212
programme.desc: Addams 212

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys find out that they are three months behind on their mortgage payments and will lose the farm if they cant come up with the money Grandpa fears that he will have to sell a 200 year old flintlock family rifle to get the payment

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate wants to discipline Hassie and Little Luke for bad grades and skipping school but Grandpa thinks she is being too tough So Kate lets Grandpa takes over raising the kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gabe Fenway a sharecropper for local landlord Preston plans to run his quarterhorse Sapphire in a local horse race Mark also plans to race his horse Blueboy in the race Preston who wants to keep all of Fenways crops believes Marks horse can beat Fenways and tricks Fenway into betting his crop against Prestons 1000 that Mark will win And to make sure that Mark wins Preston has a plan to make sure that Fenway doesnt make it to the race

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas hires a new ranch hand then learns that the man had just been released from prison for manslaughter He believes the man has turned over a new leaf and wants to start a new life but his--and the townspeoples--suspicions are aroused when a local rancher is murdered during a robbery

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When a doctor experimenting in near death experiences dies Nick secretly agrees to go under in an attempt to reconcile his own past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan learns that a woman is using a deadly quilt to murder members of a religious sect but the tightly-knit group blames him for the killing

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A groom to be gets a lesson in monogamy from the stripper from hell at his bachelor party and then his bride is overwhelmed with suspicion and mistrust and busts married men who cheat due to having caught her father step-out on mom when she was a child

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Tinker is arrested for the theft of Binghamtons printing press and The Captain taps Parker to be Tinkers Defense Counsel in a trial which Binghamton himself will preside over Parker and McHale must then stall the proceedings while Gruber and The Crew execute a plan to get Tinker off the hook with a bit of creative evidence-tampering

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy directive - Ordering all married Officers to be shipped home - Prompts Binghamton to scheme to get McHale married off to a shady saloon-keeper by the name of Kate OHara - An old friend of McHales But neither Kate nor McHale want to tie the knot so they join forces to try to thwart Binghamtons plan

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Russian agent who looks and dresses exactly like Gilligan holds Gilligan captive and questions the castaways about their activities However nobody believes Gilligans story and they accuse him of causing all the mischief

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E21
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E21

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E10
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E10

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is assigned to protect the winner of the Miss USA contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaacs Ted Lange favorite singer Roxy Blue Diahann Carroll becomes his lover Talky Robert Tanners Jim Nabors popularity increases when fellow passengers think he may be a jewel thief Bert Fredericks David Groh plans his wife Denises Michele Lee birthday party but she thinks its a murder plot

programme.title: WKRP 209
programme.desc: WKRP 209

programme.title: WKRP 216
programme.desc: WKRP 216

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava are spending a lot of time with Gil and Madeline Hall but the Halls increasingly frequent sexual banter is making Wood and Ava nervous enough to reevaluate the friendship

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Woods visiting high school friends tell incriminating stories about him to Ava and Evan And Woods former fiancée Rebecca Kincaid is back in town and still carrying a torch for him

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: While trying to spend a romantic Christmas with Rocket in the mountains Dans long lost daughter shows up He finds that he did know her mother 12 years ago and she Jill Whelan is 11 and a half

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Everyone gets the measles and Stef ends up taking care of them while Michael can only talk to her through the front door of the Inn or by phone George runs such a high fever that Stef calls the doctor to come in an emergency

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When the previous owners of the Stratford Inn become jealous of the inns new success they try to scare everyone into thinking the Inn is haunted in hopes of getting the Loudens to sell the Inn back to them

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Camp Hollister Marines must do double duty after the civilian workforce strikes over lay offs and budget cuts After Polly finds a 900 number on the phone bill and the number is no longer in service she tries to find out whom did it and why

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Ann Fisk decides to confront the Swamp Thing that he is in actuality Dr Alec Holland

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A recent storm in the swamp uncovers a car wreck from ten years agoincluding the married couples ghosts that think only hours have passed

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Commander John Koenig the new commander of Moonbase Alpha leads the investigation of a mysterious disease at the station and uncovers evidence of a far greater looming disaster

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the mother ship hits dark matter the ship dos not begin to heal itself Zoor is left in an unconscious state and Sandoval takes control He decides it is time to liberate the Earth from the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is blackmailed into slaving for a physician obsessed with curing a deadly strain of meningitis prevalent in a remote Mexican province The fugitive put ashore in Mexico after fleeing US police and swapping places with a departing sailor The expatriate Dr Howell will stop at nothing to wipe out his tiny enemy but Richard Kimble contests the ethics of Howells fanatical methods as a wily local police sergeant closes in on the convicted killer

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The return of a Spanish nobleman with a claim to land in the Valley which is already occupied becomes further complicated by a romance between Heath and the noblemans daughter

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne becomes the trail boss for a widow and her disobedient crew to help drive her cattle but she is unaware the he is the one who killed her bushwhacking husband earlier

programme.title: Young 120
programme.desc: Young 120

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A supposedly reformed sex offender is being brainwashed by his psychiatrist into believing he has committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tim Baker v. Dan Cane

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Changing your lifestyle from one of jail and rebellion to one of discipline and MMA is not an easy task, but Todd Stoute is prrof that it is possible to make that switch. At HK38, he is up against Clay Davidson and is looking for the win.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades try to take over GoBotron by replacing the Guardian leaders with robotic ringers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians launch an all-out effort to find and destroy Rogue-Star

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gar lies to his son and daughter Octo and Seena saying Audric stole the root that he developed and that Jayce has taken credit for everything Gar is taken by Saw Boss and instructs Octo to get help from the Lightning League

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Every sail and all the sail-makers in Reykjavík have been confiscated by VENOM who play to raise the city from its foundations to find the lost fleet hidden beneath
